executives.name: Mark Templeton
executives.background: Former CEO of Citrix Systems and DigitalOcean. Director at Equinix.

executives.name: Robert Calderoni
executives.background: Robert Calderoni was the Executive Chairman of Citrix Systems, Inc. and previously served as Chairman and CEO of Ariba, Inc.

executives.name: Thomas Hogan
executives.background: Thomas J. Hogan has served as a member of our board of directors since March 2021. Mr. Hogan has served as an operating partner at Battery Ventures since January 2021.
